# Work Packet ALB-030 — The Charter Trim (v0.2, Lean Chassis)

## 1. TASK

Apply the maintainer-approved trim to the ONE shipped charter (decision
2026-07-05, on the logs 019–021 evidence: real-board engagement full 1/6 vs
lean 4/6 headless; the lean chassis reproduced interactive engagement and
compaction recovery in full). Ship the lean chassis, re-add the three
untested-but-plausible capability sections in trimmed form, and validate with
a fresh A/B before sealing.

> **Conductor-implemented** (ALB-027 precedent): the section prose *is* the
> design work. Validation A/B is the acceptance gate.

## 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME

- `manifest/sections/`: new 3-tier intent gate; new `03-escalation.md`
  (replaces the 103-line operating loop; absorbs `09-recovery.md`); revised
  workbench (baseline always, investigative files on escalation); trimmed
  delegation; preamble version bump. `01-contract`, `06-skills`,
  `08-communication`, `10-re-anchor` unchanged; `07-enforcement` updated only
  where it referenced dropped sections.
- `manifest/albion-manifest.yaml` updated; `03-operating-loop.md` and
  `09-recovery.md` deleted (content absorbed or in git history).
- `charter/ALBION.md` recompiled; `bin/albion-compile --check` green.
- Target ≈190 lines compiled (from 350). Section numbering continuous 1–8.

## 3. DESIGN RULES (what the evidence bought)

- **The gate keeps ONE board rule**: everything above Trivial opens `task.md`
  + `verification.md`. No classification tier may exempt a non-trivial task
  from the board — the 5-tier routing is what GLM classified its way around.
- **The investigative board becomes an escalation rule, not an upfront tier**:
  trigger on a fix failing twice, a non-local cause, or unfamiliar territory.
- **Delegation and skills stay** (trimmed): the plugin ships 5 agents and 4
  loadable skills; the charter must keep the map to them.
- Hooks, skills, agents, tests, launcher: NOT touched. The SessionStart
  injection and strike hooks read workbench files that still exist under the
  escalation model.

## 4. MUST DO

- `bin/albion-compile --check` green after recompile; full suite green;
  CI-equivalent shellcheck batch clean.
- **Validation A/B before sealing (acceptance gate):** 4 headless runs per arm
  on `revenue-pipeline` — new v0.2 charter vs. the pre-trim charter (compiled
  from git history via `ALBION_CHARTER` override), log-020 method. Pass = v0.2
  real-board engagement ≥ the lean instrument's observed band (≥2/4) and
  solve rate unchanged (4/4). Fail = revisit before merge.

## 5. MUST NOT DO

- No changes outside `manifest/`, `charter/ALBION.md`, and this packet's docs.
- No new product modes or flags; the trim IS the one charter.
- Do not weaken the contract (§1) or enforcement (§7) semantics.

## 6. TOOLS ALLOWED

File edits in the repo; compile pipeline; bench harness for validation runs.

## 7. SUCCESS CRITERIA

- [ ] Compiled charter ≈190 lines, sections 1–8 continuous, no dangling refs.
- [ ] Drift gate + full suite + shellcheck green; CI green on push.
- [ ] Validation A/B passes the §4 gate; results journaled (log 022).
